reviews.review_title: Way to easy to get banned
reviews.review_description: Bro I just was surviving on a 16 kill streak and then the whole lobby got mad at me because they thought I was hacking, so they spam reported me, then when I got back in the game I was banned and put in a cage, LIKE WHY, IT WAS SO EASY TO REPORT THEN BAN. AND IM PERMANENTLY BANNED FOR NOTHING, THIS GAME SUCKS

Plz change it back like I wanted it to be a space game not GORILLA TAG HORROR. PLZ CHANGE BACK just read the devs response bro it had a part in the game where you were on a spaceship but I saw that the game sadly is discontinued but it did have a space map make it to where you can choose maps tho
I thought this was diffrent I saw a vid of it I played it it’s just a lousy rip off of scary as$ gorilla tag bring back the old version and map and monsters

developer_response.body: Hello, looks like you have not read the message of the day, this means your comment is a faulty complaint, next time read the message of the day!
